headline: Bank of America Cut to Hold by CFRA: Is the Big Bank Trade Running Out of Gas?
summary: CFRA cut its rating on Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) stock to Hold on Tuesday, May 19, joining a parallel downgrade of Citigroup (NYSE:C) to Hold on the same day. The twin moves frame this as a sector posture shift rather than a Bank of America stock specific concern. For long-term investors, the analyst downgrade warrants ... Bank of America Cut to Hold by CFRA: Is the Big Bank Trade Running Out of Gas?

headline: The Fed’s 2026 Cutting Path Will Make or Break PFFA’s 9.5% Yield
